prompt: Extreme macro product photography of stinging nettle plant (Urtica dioica) and beta-sitosterol source plants — fresh green nettle leaves with visible fine white hair-like stinging trichomes, serrated leaf edges, deep forest green color, placed on dark stone with small yellow nettle flowers. Some avocado slices beside showing the beta-sitosterol source. 100mm macro lens, f/4.0, ISO 200. Diffused natural light showing leaf venation and surface trichomes in sharp detail. Botanical scientific photography, no text, no labels. Lush deep greens, photorealistic unretouched documentary style.
